name: Voltage
description: Bolts of stylized lightning forking over a storm-dark field — every redraw bends each strike along a new jagged path.

code.style: --bolt: @p(var(--color1), var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3)); --tilt: @rand(-14deg, 14deg); --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 18%; top: 4%; width: 64%; height: 92%; background: var(--bolt); clip-path: polygon(@rand(40%, 60%) 0%, @rand(56%, 78%) 34%, @rand(42%, 58%) 38%, @rand(58%, 84%) 100%, @rand(38%, 54%) 52%, @rand(50%, 66%) 47%); transform: rotate(var(--tilt)); box-shadow: 0 0 calc(110px / @Y) rgba(245, 221, 50, 0.35); transition: ease 500ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
